title: Tea!
description: Add in own Minecraft a some teas without mods! (But Optifine or CIT need :3)
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SSRtYfOoyxk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Wanna drink tea in Minecraft? Well, now you can make that!
- For work resource pack you need [Optifine](https://i.pinimg.com/originals/da/fd/84/dafd84de1c89954685a3ff81f817e6ef.jpg) or [CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) _(Or something else for other core)_


<details>
<summary>All "Recipes"</summary>

| Potion:             | English:              | Русский:             |
|:-------------------:|:---------------------:|:--------------------:|
| Any Potion          | Black tea             | Чёрный чай           |
| Strength            | Peach tea             | Персиковый чай       |
| Speed               | Blue tea              | Синий чай            |
| Regeneration        | Karkade               | Каркаде              |
| Slow falling        | Chamomile tea         | Ромашковый чай       |
| Poison              | Chifir                | Чифирь               |
| Night Vision        | Green tea             | Зелёный чай          |

</details>
